arts.sum: A fantastic long range effort from Matías Soulé and some incredible saves from Mile Svilar helped Roma earn a point in the Derby della Capitale against Lazio on Sunday. Meanwhile, Verona played out a...

arts.ttl: Como Manager Fabregas Downplays Links to Milan and Roma
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas liquidated the chatter about Milan and Roma but didn’t outright announce he would keep coaching Como next season in a pre-game presser: “I’ve not been contacted by any side, as I’m completely focused on us." The post Como Manager Fabregas Downplays Links to Milan and Roma appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
